source_policy.verified: Supported by an original supplied document or statement.
source_policy.recorded: Present in the command-centre model but not independently confirmed.
source_policy.inferred: A reasonable interpretation which still needs checking.
source_policy.scenario: An adjustable illustration, not a prediction or instruction.
source_policy.unknown: Information required before a confident decision.

current_focus.principle: Protect housing, health, essentials and evidence before allocating expected money or expanding risk.
current_focus.daily_rule: One main mission, two support actions and a reduced-power option.

known_default_components.name: Perch/Lendable
known_default_components.warning: Verify current owner, balance, charges and enforceability before offering payment.

known_default_components.name: Lowell/Vanquis
known_default_components.warning: One underlying account; do not double count lender and purchaser.

finance.settlement_rule: Expected money is not cleared cash. Do not allocate it until signed, paid and reconciled to the final payslip.
latest_statement_signals: Repeated small food, supermarket and takeaway purchases
Overlapping TFL, Lime, Uber and rail activity including unpaid-fare entries
Repeated transfers into Revolut followed by small spending bursts
Frequent friend/family transfers which need an honest generosity allowance
Transfers between Tolu-owned accounts must not be classified as spending
Revolut UK account migration occurred in July 2026

career.founder_gate: Run a 90-day market test, create a paid diagnostic, conduct real buyer conversations and win two paying customers before depending on a new venture.
career.empire_rule: Build one credible revenue engine before expanding into multiple ventures.

priority_tasks.decision_gate: Final wording, adviser certificate, payment date and actual net amount.
Current owner, statement, charges and affordable disposable income.
Current clinical response, next referral and consolidated symptom evidence.
Venue, case details, reconciled payment ledger and adviser position.
Landlord schedule matched to bank evidence.
Every device, location and session individually confirmed.

assistant_rules: Check generated_at and ask for a newer spreadsheet or app sync when recency matters.
Never claim browser-local app state is visible through this file.
Connect recommendations to task IDs, evidence gaps and related life areas.
Provide a minimum viable action for low-energy days.
Do not diagnose medical conditions or provide regulated legal or financial advice.
Never invent balances, deadlines, email contents or source links.
